common.to_many_request.message: The number of requests on your network has reached the limit, please try again later

ai-gateway.used_quota_error.solution: Please try again or contact the administrator

ai-gateway.insufficient_quota.message: Insufficient quota - User does not have enough quota
ai-gateway.insufficient_quota.solution: Please try again after obtaining more credits

ai-gateway.deduction_failed.solution: Please try again or contact the administrator

ai-gateway.invalid_params.solution: Please confirm whether the request parameters are correct

ai-gateway.redis_error.solution: Please try again or contact the administrator

ai-gateway.star_required.message: Need to star the GitHub project first
ai-gateway.star_required.solution: You need to star the GitHub project first

ai-gateway.concurrent_limit.message: Concurrent connections have reached the limit
ai-gateway.concurrent_limit.solution: Please try again later or disconnect other requests(Cancelled requests might still be running. You can try restarting VS Code to completely close the connection.).

oidc-auth.badRequestParameter.solution: Please initiate login through the VSCode plugin, do not manually modify request parameters

oidc-auth.loginEncryptFailed.solution: Please initiate login through the VSCode plugin, do not manually modify request parameters

oidc-auth.LoginDecryptFailed.solution: Please initiate login through the VSCode plugin, do not manually modify request parameters

oidc-auth.userNotFound.solution: Please log in again to obtain a valid token

oidc-auth.tokenInvalid.solution: Please log in again to obtain a valid token

oidc-auth.updateInfoFailed.solution: Please try again or log in again

oidc-auth.bindAccountFailed.solution: Please try again or log in again

oidc-auth.tokenGenerateFailed.solution: Please try again or log in again

oidc-auth.authenticationFailed.solution: Please log in again to obtain a valid token

chat-rag.context_length_exceeded.message: The request exceeds the model's maximum context length. Please reduce the length of your input.
chat-rag.context_length_exceeded.solution: It might be due to an excessive number of conversation rounds or reading a large file/non-text file. To continue, please create a new task.

chat-rag.model_services_unavailable.message: Unable to access the AI model services. Please try again later.
chat-rag.model_services_unavailable.solution: The service may be unavailable due to an excessively long context, model overload, timeout while queuing for the model, non-existence of the model, or abnormality in model service. It is suggested that you check whether the current context contains very large files leading to an overly long context, and refresh the model list to confirm the existence of the model.

chat-rag.internal_error.solution: Please try again later, or contact the administrator.

chat-rag.model_unavailable.message: The current model is unavailable (it may have been discontinued); please select another model.

chat-rag.model_services_unauthorized.message: Unauthorized access to model services. Please check your permissions.

chat-rag.too_many_requests.message: CoStrict is functioning normally, but the request count or total token usage has reached the limit imposed by the upstream model provider. Please try again later.

chat-rag.context_too_long.solution: It may be due to an excessive number of dialogue rounds or reading large files/non-text files, causing the context to contain abnormal characters or exceed the model's limit. To continue, please create a new task.

chat-rag.network_interrupt.solution: The internal server's connection to the model service was interrupted due to network fluctuations (possibly caused by network anomalies or slow model inference). Please try again later.

chat-rag.server_busy.solution: The request has been sent to the model service, but it has not returned the first token for a long time, which may be due to an excessive number of online users causing significant pressure on the model. Please try again later.

chat-rag.stream_idle_timeout.message: The model response has timed out.
chat-rag.stream_idle_timeout.solution: The model may not have responded within the specified time due to load or other reasons, please retry. If it fails multiple times, please contact the administrator.

chat-rag.total_stream_idle_timeout.message: The model response has timed out.
chat-rag.total_stream_idle_timeout.solution: The model may not have responded within the specified time due to load or other reasons, please retry. If it fails multiple times, please contact the administrator.

chat-rag.invalid_response_content.message: The model is unable to perform inference or makes errors during inference.
chat-rag.invalid_response_content.solution: The current model inference is abnormal (there is no output, which might be due to excessively long context or only processing without actual output). It's recommended to start a new task and avoid directly feeding large files and non-pure text to the model for processing. (The calculation method for context overflow is: historical context length + current session context length + maximum output token number > total context length).

codebase-indexer.unsupported_language.solution: The programming language is currently not supported

codebase-indexer.authentication_failed.solution: Please log in again to obtain a valid token

codebase-indexer.internal_server_error.solution: Please try again later, or contact the administrator.

codebase-indexer.bad_request.solution: Please confirm whether the request parameters are correct

codebase-indexer.workspace_not_registere.solution: Please restart the IDE or rebuild the index

codebase-querier.findPortFailed.solution: Check if the client reverse proxy tunnel is successful
